items.summary: Diagnose and fix the end-to-end registration flow so that a signed-in user can successfully register as Traveller or Driver from the Register page without the backend trapping, and the UI transitions to the correct dashboard after a successful registration.

Update backend registration methods to avoid using Runtime.trap for expected registration errors; return RegistrationStatus.failure with an English message instead, so the frontend can display actionable errors (including for admin registration).

Fix backend role/profile values so the frontend can reliably determine whether the registered user is an admin, driver, or traveller based on getCallerUserProfile output (including aligning the backend’s UserProfile.role encoding with what the generated frontend types represent).

Enable a workable admin registration experience: if the system has no admin configured yet, allow the first admin to be created; otherwise, restrict admin creation per existing authorization rules and return a friendly failure message when the caller is not allowed.
